restrictions.outwardHtml:
By any train except those timed to depart Mondays‐Fridays before 09:26 but if fare is £8.50 or more, an AnyTrain Offpeak must be issued.

The restriction for this ticket is generally 09:30 but an easement applies to this journey.

G3.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 GWR Temporary Restriction Code used during engineering work.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
For Travel from Monday 12 to Thursday 15 August 2024:

Travelling via Hereford and Oxford, not valid on trains to depart Hereford before 06:56.

Travelling via Newport (South Wales), not valid on trains timed to depart Newport (South Wales) before 02:00 or after 05:45 and before 08:46.

Not valid on trains timed to arrive at Euston before 11:30

Not valid on trains timed to arrive at London Waterloo before 09:52.
restrictions.outwardText:
For Travel from Monday 12 to Thursday 15 August 2024:
 Travelling via Hereford and Oxford, not valid on trains to depart Hereford before 06:56.
 Travelling via Newport (South Wales), not valid on trains timed to depart Newport (South Wales) before 02:00 or after 05:45 and before 08:46.
 Not valid on trains timed to arrive at Euston before 11:30
 Not valid on trains timed to arrive at London Waterloo before 09:52.
restrictions.returnHtml:
For Travel from Monday 12 to Thursday 15 August 2024:

Travelling via Evesham

Not valid on trains timed to depart:

  • London Paddington before 09:12 and after 16:40 until 18:32. (also valid at 08:51 and 17:57)
  • Reading before 09:39 and after 17:03 until 18:56. (also valid at 09:18 and 18:24)
  • Didcot before 09:53
  • London Euston after 04:29 and before 09:26 or after 15:00 and before 18:45

Travelling via Newport (South Wales)

Not valid on trains timed to depart:

  • London Paddington before 09:12 and after 16:40 until 18:32.
  • Reading before 09:39 and after 17:03 until 18:56.
  • Didcot before 09:53
  • London Waterloo before 08:15.
  • Clapham Junction before 08:20.
restrictions.returnText:
For Travel from Monday 12 to Thursday 15 August 2024:
 Travelling via Evesham
 Not valid on trains timed to depart:
 London Paddington before 09:12 and after 16:40 until 18:32. (also valid at 08:51 and 17:57)

 London Euston after 04:29 and before 09:26 or after 15:00 and before 18:45

 Not valid on trains timed to depart:

G5.applicableDaysText:

G5.seasonalVariationsHtml:
Restrictions will be eased on Monday 24th August 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased between 21st December 2026 and 1st January 2027 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased between Friday 3rd April 2026 and Monday 6th April 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions will be eased on Monday 4th May 2026 and 25th May 2026 in both directions.

Restrictions apply on connecting trains from Kent into London St Pancras International and vice versa via line High Speed 1 (HS1) on Mondays to Fridays as follows:

  • Not valid on HS1 trains timed to arrive in London St Pancras International after 04:29 and before 09:59;
  • Not valid on HS1 trains timed to depart London St Pancras International after 15:59 until 18:59.

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart before 09:30.

In addition, not valid on any train departing Birmingham New Street, Birmingham Snow Hill, Birmingham Moor Street, Five Ways or Jewellery Quarter between 16:34 and 18:01.

This does not apply if passengers hold tickets for through journeys, i.e. if a change of train is required at one of these five stations to complete their journey.

If fare is £8.80 or more, an 'nNetwork Daytripper' should be issued.
